description: Composition Printed blue kurta with a blue chest panel, made of 100% cotton, has a round neck with a slit, three-quarter sleeves with hakoba, piping at the hem and is mildly pleated, mirror, sequin and embroidery work on the yoke, and has pin tucks below the bust Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Wear art wherever you go! The neat embroidery and smudged floral print make this kurta from aneri a fab buy. Crafted from soft cotton fabric in stylish cuts, this kurta offers exemplary comfort and is sure to elevate into a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with blue leggings or churidar, stilettos and chunky earrings. Model statistics The product is a size S on a model of height 5'7" and chest 32"
